title: 5/21/2022 thoughts (logged Oct 2022)
html:
TL;DR

  • Library-floor 6, hungover from "the drunkest I've ever been" — Yahir cataloging unspoken dynamics in his OSU friend group on a Saturday morning
  • Reads Ryan as condescending toward Ayden, reads Ryan/Lily as performative; reads Luke as self-conscious; vibes with Cassidy who saved him a seat
  • Plaza Palooza confrontation: ran into Annabella who called him out for ghosting — went for hug, got no embrace, "stance has been made clear, that chapter is over"
  • Critiques his own pattern: doesn't know what to do without externally-assigned tasks — a flaw he previously called out in others
  • First explicit articulation of the "do a good present, the future takes care of itself" mantra that recurs across 2022–2023 journals
  • Closes on the foundational mission: "begin laying the foundation for my company / life / legacy" + "someone to experience life with"

Notes

A long, single-paragraph 2am-style brain-dump written 5/21/2022 but only logged into Google Docs in October. Yahir is sitting on the 6th floor of the OSU library after the worst hangover of his life, half-watching the OSIG orbit's social mechanics and judging them.

The friend-group reads — Ryan as condescending boyfriend, Lily as a "tool he utilizes," Luke as self-conscious, Owen as "only able to flex Gabby" — are some of the sharpest social anthropology in the early-OSU journals. The recurring meta-question Yahir keeps poking at: "What are you a part of?" He answers for himself: OSIG, Phi Delt orbit, the running-with-Mari pickleball PAC.

The Annabella re-encounter at Plaza Palooza is the closure moment for an ambient pre-Jo dating attempt — went for a hug, got nothing, walked away clear that "she's not what I'm looking for."

The ending commits to a barbell strategy that becomes Yahir's standing thesis: build a small bag/brand/legacy in parallel with finding "someone to experience life with." The "do a good present and the future takes care of itself" line shows up in nearly identical form in the Jo arc opener later that year.

Connects to: 2022 04 12 instead of osig, 2022 07 18 why mom maya jann brenda dad.
